description: Record of a birth, probably. In Judaeo-Arabic (in two different hands) and Arabic script. The date is given according to multiple calendars, including 13 Iyyar 4909 AM, which is 23 April 1149 CE. Also dated 13 Dhū l-Qiʿda 543 AH (should be Dhū l-Ḥijja, as Goitein comments). There are a photostat and a transcription in Goitein's attached notes (to be uploaded).
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בSPIOS.
